appliedUpdates.description: Note that validation contract VAL-CROSS-008 (Blok deletion protection) was already implemented in a prior fix feature (fix-blok-delete-check) before cross-module-integration was created. The cross-module-integration feature correctly identified this was pre-existing.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the Excel import/export pattern for transaction modules. All three modules (Kas, Bank, Gudang) follow the same pattern: handleImportXxx function in ListPage calls importXxxBatch in database, which validates and creates transactions with PENDING_APPROVAL_1 status. ExcelImportModal is reused across all modules.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All transaction modules use identical Excel import pattern with handleImportBank -> importXxxBatch -> ExcelImportModal. transaction-bank-excel and transaction-gudang-excel both found their features already implemented by the base module workers.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Database engine specification mismatch: AGENTS.md specifies better-sqlite3 but all transaction modules use sql.js. Either update AGENTS.md to reflect sql.js or investigate why workers chose sql.js over better-sqlite3.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Kas, Bank, and Gudang modules all use sql.js for database operations. transaction-bank review explicitly notes this discrepancy.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance that frontend workers should use agent-browser for UI verification. transaction-kas-excel review noted worker did not use agent-browser despite frontend-worker skill requiring it.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: transaction-kas-excel: 'The frontend-worker skill specifies using agent-browser for UI verification, but the worker did not use it. They only ran typecheck, lint, and build.'

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document handoff commitId accuracy requirement. transaction-bank review found handoff commitId (c5db95c - dist rebuild) didn't match actual implementation commit (2fc7ef9 - feat: Add Bank module). This could cause traceability issues during review.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: transaction-bank review: 'The handoff file's commitId (c5db95c) points to the dist rebuild commit rather than the actual Bank module implementation commit (2fc7ef9).'
